name: Multimodal Pretraining for Generalizable EEG Representation Learning

description: arXiv:2607.21384v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) models used for epilepsy are often limited to specific datasets and tasks. This limited approach can make it challenging to apply these models across different datasets or in various situations. However, recent studies in foundation models and self-supervised learning suggest that an adaptable EEG backbone could suppor...
author: Targol Bakhtiarvand, Jugal Kalita, Adham Atyabi
